title: Select Color for Milestones
excerpt: Whilst the GANTT coloring options are quite flexible it would be good to have the option in settings to separately set a colour for milestones to ensure they stand-out correctly.

posts.author: JustAnotherPM (Stuart Hooker)
posts.cookedHtml: Whilst the GANTT coloring options are quite flexible it would be good to have the option in settings to separately set a colour for milestones to ensure they stand-out correctly.
